payload.short_description: dark carved wooden chair edge crop
payload.long_description: Partial crop of a dark reddish-brown polished wooden dining chair showing an ornate carved openwork backrest with circular/scroll motifs and visible rear legs; lower portion is cut off by the image border and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m).
